items.raw_excerpt: Offices, public parks, bars — watch parties popped up at all the usual spots for Wednesday’s semifinal World Cup match. But one was in something of an unusual location: New York’s sprawling Rikers Island correctional facility, better known for its overcrowding and violence than for hosting social events. More than…
items.summary_en: Watch parties for the World Cup semifinal were held across New York City. One party took place at the Rikers Island jail, a facility known for overcrowding and violence. The event allowed inmates to watch the match together.
items.summary_ko: 뉴욕시 전역에서 월드컵 준결승 응원 파티가 열렸습니다. 과밀과 폭력으로 악명 높은 라이커스 섬 교도소에서도 행사가 진행되었습니다. 이 행사를 통해 수감자들이 함께 경기를 관람했습니다.
items.title_en: NYC's Rikers Island jail hosts World Cup watch party for inmates
items.title_ko: 뉴욕 라이커스 섬 교도소에서 월드컵 응원 파티 열려
items.title_original: NYC’s Rikers Island jail hosts World Cup watch party for inmates

items.raw_excerpt: Ellen Haudeck was in court in North Battleford on Wednesday to learn her sentence after being convicted of criminally neglecting animals in her care. She received a four-month conditional sentence order followed by 20 months of probation.
items.summary_en: Ellen Haudeck was convicted of criminally neglecting animals in her care near North Battleford, Saskatchewan. She received a four-month conditional sentence followed by 20 months of probation. A lifetime ban on owning animals was also imposed.
items.summary_ko: 엘런 하우데크는 서스캐처원 주 북 배틀포드 근처에서 사육 동물을 방치한 혐의로 유죄 판결을 받았다. 그녀는 4개월 조건부 명령과 20개월 보호 관찰을 선고받았으며, 평생 동물 소유가 금지되었다.
items.title_en: Woman banned from owning animals for life after starving horses near North Battleford
items.title_ko: 북 배틀포드 근처에서 말을 굶긴 여성, 평생 동물 소유 금지
items.title_original: Woman whose horses starved near North Battleford, Sask., prohibited from having animals for life

items.raw_excerpt: Running from July 31 to August 3, Canal Days in Port Colborne, Ontario, is widely considered the ultimate way to kick off the month of August.
items.summary_en: Canal Days runs from July 31 to August 3 in Port Colborne, Ontario. The festival celebrates the town's nautical heritage along the Welland Canal. Thousands of visitors are expected to attend the annual waterfront event.
items.summary_ko: 캐나다 온타리오주 포트콜버느에서 7월 31일부터 8월 3일까지 운하 축제가 열린다. 이 축제는 웰런드 운하를 따라 이어지는 도시의 해양 역사를 기념하는 행사다. 매년 수천 명의 방문객이 이 해안가 축제에 모여든다.
items.title_en: Port Colborne Canal Days Festival Returns This August
items.title_original: Canal Days celebrates Port Colborne’s nautical roots with thousands expected to gather this August - The Spec

items.raw_excerpt: A crash in Jefferson County sent four people to the hospital on Monday.
items.summary_en: A crash in Jefferson County sent four people to the hospital on Monday. Emergency crews with ambulances and a helicopter rushed to the scene near Antwerp. The injured were taken to multiple hospitals in the area.
items.summary_ko: 월요일 제퍼슨 카운티 앤티워프 인근에서 교통사고가 발생해 4명이 병원으로 이송됐다. 구급차와 헬기 등 긴급 출동 인력이 현장에 투입됐으며, 부상자들은 인근 여러 병원으로 분산 후송됐다.
items.title_en: Crash Near Antwerp Sends Four People to Hospitals
items.title_original: Ambulances, chopper rush 4 to hospitals after crash near Antwerp - WWNY
